productDisplayName: Puma Men's 917 Mid Funpack Black Yellow White Shoe
description: This pair of puma shoes are a combination of bold design and comfortable materials. The graffiti design on the toe box and heel counter of this pair gives you that stylish edge and  sets you apart from the crowd.Upper Canvas upper with chamfered heel made of contrast graphic and puma logo Extra hook and loop fastening around ankle for snug Fit and absolute comfort Synthetic twill tape laces in dual tone looped around metallic eyelets Synthetic rubber toe box for extra durability and protection of the forefoot Canvas stylish side strips in contrast colour Midsole Comfort insole with canvas tongue to ensure a snug, comfortable fit Textile lining for added comfort Outsole Made of high traction gum rubber Rubber toe guard strip with tonal sidewall trip Textured to suit the anatomy of the feet for maximum grip Reinforced heel with dip in back collar line to prevent Achilles tendon irritation
